root_text.sn22.97:1.2: Ekamantaṁ nisinno kho so bhikkhu bhagavantaṁ etadavoca:
root_text.sn22.97:1.3: “atthi nu kho, bhante, kiñci rūpaṁ yaṁ rūpaṁ niccaṁ dhuvaṁ sassataṁ avipariṇāmadhammaṁ sassatisamaṁ tatheva ṭhassati?
root_text.sn22.97:1.4: Atthi nu kho, bhante, kāci vedanā yā vedanā niccā dhuvā sassatā avipariṇāmadhammā sassatisamaṁ tatheva ṭhassati?
root_text.sn22.97:1.5: Atthi nu kho, bhante, kāci saññā …pe…
root_text.sn22.97:1.6: keci saṅkhārā, ye saṅkhārā niccā dhuvā sassatā avipariṇāmadhammā sassatisamaṁ tatheva ṭhassanti?
root_text.sn22.97:1.7: Atthi nu kho, bhante, kiñci viññāṇaṁ, yaṁ viññāṇaṁ niccaṁ dhuvaṁ sassataṁ avipariṇāmadhammaṁ sassatisamaṁ tatheva ṭhassatī”ti?
root_text.sn22.97:1.8: “Natthi kho, bhikkhu, kiñci rūpaṁ, yaṁ rūpaṁ niccaṁ dhuvaṁ sassataṁ avipariṇāmadhammaṁ sassatisamaṁ tatheva ṭhassati.
root_text.sn22.97:1.12: kiñci viññāṇaṁ, yaṁ viññāṇaṁ niccaṁ dhuvaṁ sassataṁ avipariṇāmadhammaṁ sassatisamaṁ tatheva ṭhassatī”ti.
root_text.sn22.97:2.1: Atha kho bhagavā parittaṁ nakhasikhāyaṁ paṁsuṁ āropetvā taṁ bhikkhuṁ etadavoca:
root_text.sn22.97:2.2: “ettakampi kho, bhikkhu, rūpaṁ natthi niccaṁ dhuvaṁ sassataṁ avipariṇāmadhammaṁ sassatisamaṁ tatheva ṭhassati.
root_text.sn22.97:2.3: Ettakañcepi, bhikkhu, rūpaṁ abhavissa niccaṁ dhuvaṁ sassataṁ avipariṇāmadhammaṁ, nayidaṁ brahmacariyavāso paññāyetha sammā dukkhakkhayāya.
root_text.sn22.97:2.4: Yasmā ca kho, bhikkhu, ettakampi rūpaṁ natthi niccaṁ dhuvaṁ sassataṁ avipariṇāmadhammaṁ, tasmā brahmacariyavāso paññāyati sammā dukkhakkhayāya”.
root_text.sn22.97:3.1: Ettakāpi kho, bhikkhu, vedanā natthi niccā dhuvā sassatā avipariṇāmadhammā sassatisamaṁ tatheva ṭhassati.
root_text.sn22.97:3.2: Ettakā cepi, bhikkhu, vedanā abhavissa niccā dhuvā sassatā avipariṇāmadhammā, na yidaṁ brahmacariyavāso paññāyetha sammā dukkhakkhayāya.
root_text.sn22.97:3.3: Yasmā ca kho, bhikkhu, ettakāpi vedanā natthi niccā dhuvā sassatā avipariṇāmadhammā, tasmā brahmacariyavāso paññāyati sammā dukkhakkhayāya.
root_text.sn22.97:4.2: ettakāpi kho, bhikkhu, saṅkhārā natthi niccā dhuvā sassatā avipariṇāmadhammā sassatisamaṁ tatheva ṭhassanti.
root_text.sn22.97:4.3: Ettakā cepi, bhikkhu, saṅkhārā abhavissaṁsu niccā dhuvā sassatā avipariṇāmadhammā, na yidaṁ brahmacariyavāso paññāyetha sammā dukkhakkhayāya.
root_text.sn22.97:4.4: Yasmā ca kho, bhikkhu, ettakāpi saṅkhārā natthi niccā dhuvā sassatā avipariṇāmadhammā, tasmā brahmacariyavāso paññāyati sammā dukkhakkhayāya.
root_text.sn22.97:5.1: Ettakampi kho, bhikkhu, viññāṇaṁ natthi niccaṁ dhuvaṁ sassataṁ avipariṇāmadhammaṁ sassatisamaṁ tatheva ṭhassati.
root_text.sn22.97:5.2: Ettakampi kho, bhikkhu, viññāṇaṁ abhavissa niccaṁ dhuvaṁ sassataṁ avipariṇāmadhammaṁ, na yidaṁ brahmacariyavāso paññāyetha sammā dukkhakkhayāya.
root_text.sn22.97:5.3: Yasmā ca kho, bhikkhu, ettakampi viññāṇaṁ natthi niccaṁ dhuvaṁ sassataṁ avipariṇāmadhammaṁ, tasmā brahmacariyavāso paññāyati sammā dukkhakkhayāya.

translation_text.sn22.97:1.2: Seated to one side, that mendicant said to the Buddha:
translation_text.sn22.97:1.3: “Sir, is there any form at all that’s permanent, everlasting, eternal, imperishable, and will last forever and ever?
translation_text.sn22.97:1.7: consciousness at all that’s permanent, everlasting, eternal, imperishable, and will last forever and ever?”
translation_text.sn22.97:1.8: “Mendicant, there is no form at all that’s permanent, everlasting, eternal, imperishable, and will last forever and ever.
translation_text.sn22.97:1.12: consciousness at all that’s permanent, everlasting, eternal, imperishable, and will last forever and ever.”
translation_text.sn22.97:2.1: Then the Buddha, picking up a little bit of dirt on his fingernail, addressed that mendicant:
translation_text.sn22.97:2.2: “There’s not even this much of any form that’s permanent, everlasting, eternal, imperishable, and will last forever and ever.
translation_text.sn22.97:2.3: If there were, this living of the spiritual life for the complete ending of suffering would not be found.
translation_text.sn22.97:2.4: But since there isn’t, this living of the spiritual life for the complete ending of suffering is found.
translation_text.sn22.97:3.1: There’s not even this much of any feeling …
translation_text.sn22.97:5.1: consciousness that’s permanent, everlasting, eternal, imperishable, and will last forever and ever.
translation_text.sn22.97:5.2: If there were, this living of the spiritual life for the complete ending of suffering would not be found.
translation_text.sn22.97:5.3: But since there isn’t, this living of the spiritual life for the complete ending of suffering is found.
translation_text.sn22.97:6.11: They understand: ‘… there is nothing further for this place.’”
